cards.front: What is the time complexity of Bubble Sort?
cards.back: O(n^2) in the worst and average cases, O(n) in the best case.

cards.front: What is the term for the process of finding the minimum element in an unsorted array?
What is the name of the sorting algorithm that builds the sorted array one element at a time?
What is the primary difference between Bubble Sort and Selection Sort?
cards.back: Bubble Sort compares adjacent elements and swaps them if they are in the wrong order, while Selection Sort selects the minimum element from the unsorted part of the array.

cards.front: What is the term for comparing adjacent elements in ascending or descending order?
